action.reasoning: Observation: RF on Morgan FP (2048bit,r=2) with n_est=30,max_depth=10 on full~105k train +2k val gives MAE 0.393 (val 0.406). Analysis: Underpowered model (low trees, capped depth); full val would give better estimate; SMILES FP methods can reach ~0.12-0.14 so room to improve before trying 3D GNNs or MLP. Decision: Update model.py for stronger RF (n_est=100, max_depth=None, n_jobs=-1, radius=3), clean/fix train.py to use full data/no unused subsample vars, retrain+log, submit_eval for improved baseline and timing.
